message:
fix(swarm,tui): orchestrator pane tracking, layout indent consistency

Two targeted fixes:

1. Swarm orchestrator (orchestrator.go):
   - createSession(): first pane ID now always appended to result.PaneIDs
     even when spec.Panes is empty — tmux creates it unconditionally
   - GracefulShutdown(): result.PanesKilled incremented only when signal
     was actually delivered (inside success branch), not unconditionally

2. Dashboard layout indentation (dashboard.go):
   - All three layout renderers (split, ultra, mega) switch from
     hardcoded "  " + JoinHorizontal to indentDashboardLayout() helper
     using lipgloss PaddingLeft(2) for consistent 2-space indent on
     all lines, not just the first

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
